'''shavala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placemonger|placemonger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placemonger|placemonger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shavala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shævælæth|shævælæth]] || [[word:shævælæj|shævælæj]] || [[word:shævælæsh|shævælæsh]] || [[word:shævælæ|shævælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavavalath|shavavalath]] || [[word:shavavalaj|shavavalaj]] || [[word:shavavalash|shavavalash]] || [[word:shavavala|shavavala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavalath|shavalath]] || [[word:shavalaj|shavalaj]] || [[word:shavalash|shavalash]] || [[word:shavala|shavala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavaflath|shavaflath]] || [[word:shavaflaj|shavaflaj]] || [[word:shavaflash|shavaflash]] || [[word:shavaflaf|shavaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shavalatha|shavalatha]] || [[word:shavalaja|shavalaja]] || [[word:shavalasha|shavalasha]] || [[word:shavalaka|shavalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shavalath|shavalath]] || [[word:shavalaj|shavalaj]] || [[word:shavalash|shavalash]] || [[word:shavala|shavala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shavalathal|shavalathal]] || [[word:shavalajal|shavalajal]] || [[word:shavalashal|shavalashal]] || [[word:shavalakal|shavalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shavalathatha|shavalathatha]] || [[word:shavalajaja|shavalajaja]] || [[word:shavalashasha|shavalashasha]] || [[word:shavalaka|shavalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shavalathan|shavalathan]] || [[word:shavalajan|shavalajan]] || [[word:shavalashan|shavalashan]] || [[word:shavalakan|shavalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shavalathaoro|shavalathaoro]] || [[word:shavalajaoro|shavalajaoro]] || [[word:shavalashaoro|shavalashaoro]] || [[word:shavalakaoro|shavalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
